title: Madras High Court lauds young judge for taking action against lawyers who disrupted her court
description: The Madras High Court recently refused to quash proceedings initiated against a group of lawyers accused of disrupting trial proceedings before a Judicial Magistrate in Madurai. In the order dated April 30, Justice L Victoria Gowri observed that the case raised serious issues concerning the functioning and authority of courts. The Court also commended the Magistrate for maintaining firmness in the face of alleged pressure from members of the Bar. “In the case at hand, this Court is witness to a
